reviews.review_description:
My daughter  started playing Thursday game for he first Time. Got into the game was using a mod they gave you whe you enter the game then got banned from cheating?!?!? If you can't use them then why are the given??? And how can you ban someone who just started the game and has no clue what the supposed rules are?? 
Kinda frustrated she's upset and now banned for a week?!!?

I'd honestly rate 0 stars if could  thanks yall....
